sections.value: THIS HIRE PURCHASE AGREEMENT is made  this _______ day of ______ 20__
Mr Aaron Bob, a businessman, of wali family, rumuokoro community, rivers state,  (hereinafter called 'the owner') of the one part
Miss victoria samuel, a tailor, of aleruchi family, rumuekeni community, rivers state, (hereinafter called 'the hirer') of the other part.

value: 1. the hirer is desirous to purchase an electronic sewing machine and she has approached the Owner to hire the electronic sewing machine.

2. the owner has acquired the said electronic sewing machine from the dealer for the abovementioned purpose and in consideration of the above, the owner has agreed to give on hire to purchase to the hirer in accordance with the terms of hire-purchase agreement.

sections.value: NOW THIS HIRE PURCHASE AGREEMENT WITNESSES AS FOLLOWS;

value:
1. The owner shall let and the hirer shall take on hire the electronic sewing machine, more particularly described in the 1st Schedule of this agreement on the following terms and conditions.

2. The hirer shall pay to the owner on the execution of these conditions, for the option to purchase herein contained the sum of N90,000 (ninety Thousand Naira) on a weekly basis for a period of 35 weeks by way of rent for the hire of the said electronic sewing machine, the first payment to be made on the _____ day of ________ 20__ and each subsequent payment on a weekly basis, until the agreement sooner expires or determined

3. The hirer during the continuance of the hiring, will not sell, assign, pledge, mortgage, underlet, lend or part with the possession of the said electronic sewing machine or otherwise deal with the said electronic sewing machine and will not take the same out of the city of port-harcourt, without the owner's written consent.

4. The hirer during the continuance of the hiring shall keep the said electronic sewing machine in good repair condition and working order (reasonable wear and tear excepted) and will permit the owner, his servants or agents to have access to the said electronic sewing machine for the purpose of inspecting the condition thereof.

5. The hirer shall pay all cost and fees, payable in respect of the maintainance of the said electronic sewing machine.

6. The hirer may at any time terminate the hiring by returning the said electronic sewing machine at his own cost and risk to the owner at his place of address for the time being.

7. If the hirer shall make default in payment of any weekly sum payable hereunder for a period of two weeks after the same shall have become due or shall fail to observe the terms and conditions of this agreement or if the hirer becomes bankrupt or a receiver is appointed of his property or if distress or execution is levied against his property or if the hirer shall do or cause to be done or permit or suffer any act or thing whereby the owner's rights in the said electronic sewing machine may be prejudiced or put in jeopardy, the owner may without prejudice to the owner's claim for arrears of hire or damages for breach of this contract, terminate the hiring without notice and retake possession of the said electronic sewing machine and it shall be lawful for the owner, his agents or servants to enter upon any premises where the said electronic sewing machine may be and seize and take possession thereof. And on determination of the hiring as aforesaid the hirer will remain liable for the arrears of hire, payment or for damages for breach of this agreement and the owner may enforce such claim by action or otherwise.

8. The hirer shall use the said electronic sewing machine for business purpose only and will not allow the same to be used for private purpose.

9. The hirer has examined or has caused to be examined the said electronic sewing machine and satisfied himself as to its condition and no warranty is implied on the part of the owner as to the quality or state of the electronic sewing machine as to its fitness for any purpose, whatsoever.

10. If the hirer shall duly perform and observe all the stipulations and conditions in this agreement contained on his part to be performed and observed and shall pay to the owner weekly sums by way of rent amounting together with the sum paid for the option to purchase to the sum of N3,150,000(three Million, one-fifty thousand Naira) and shall also pay all other sums of money which may become payable to him by the hirer under this agreement, the hiring shall come to an end and the said electronic sewing machine shall become the property of the hirer and the owner will assign and make over all his rights and interest in the same to the hirer but until all such payments as aforesaid have been made, the said electronic sewing machine will remain the property of the owner and shall not be assignable in favour of a third party.

11. That upon the payment of the last installment the ownership of the said electronic sewing machine shall automatically pass to the hirer and the owner shall be under obligation to effect change of ownership and handover all original documents.

12. Any notices required to be given herein shall be given to the parties hereto in writing and by either Registered Post Acknowledged by parties, due or by hand delivery at the addresses above mentioned or at such other addresses as the parties hereto may hereafter substitute by notice in writing.
IN WITNESS OF WHICH the parties have executed this hire purchase agreement the day and year first above written.

By the within named Owner:

____________________
Mr Aaron Bob

By the within named Hirer:

_____________________
Miss victoria samuel
